atmosphere: Hearthlight over paper and warm tooling with bounded cool structure.

emberOrange.description: Control pressure and tags should carry ember orange without turning into alarm red.

controlledMineralBlue.description: Functions should provide a bounded cool structural anchor.

leatherMethodWarmth.description: Methods should stay in leather warmth, separate from keyword pressure.

livedInSage.description: Strings should provide a calm lived-in green reading lane.

dryOchreType.description: Types should read as dry ochre classification signals.

dustyConstant.description: Numbers and constants should stay in dusty terracotta-plum rather than control orange.

materialRules: Warmth should feel lit, not dirty.
Orange can lead, but it cannot consume every role.
